heading: Purposes
label: 22302 Purposes
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2230236:3403., , .Oct. 15, 1962Pub. L. 87–817, § 376 Stat. 930
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2230236:3403., , .Oct. 15, 1962Pub. L. 87–817, § 376 Stat. 930

children.text: to serve as a coordinating, research, and educational agency and clearinghouse for symphony orchestras to help strengthen the work in their local communities;
to assist in the formation of new symphony orchestras;
to encourage and recognize the work of America’s musicians, conductors, and composers, through suitable means; and
to aid the expansion of the musical and cultural life of the United States through suitable educational and service activities.
